page.title: Computers
page.tagline: Machines and cloud sandboxes that host agent runtimes.

empty.title: No computers connected yet
empty.hint: Add a computer to let your agents run code, read files, and use local tools.

this_desktop.title: This Desktop
this_desktop.description: Use the Mac you're currently on. Already set up.

another_machine.title: Another machine
another_machine.description: A server, another laptop, or a remote box. Install with one command.

cloud.title: Cloud computer
cloud.description: A managed sandbox provisioned by Multica. No setup.

install.title: Install Multica on the target machine
install.step_1: SSH into the machine you want to connect.
install.token_warning: This token is shown once and expires in 15 minutes. Keep this page open until the new computer appears.
install.waiting: Waiting for this computer to register…
install.polling_hint: We'll detect it automatically when it connects.
install.diagnose_hint: Add --diagnose to write a redacted log to ~/Library/Logs/Multica.

remove.title: Remove this computer?
remove.description: The daemon will stop receiving tasks from this workspace and the credential will be revoked. The machine itself is not uninstalled.
remove.in_use_description: {{count}} active agent runs are bound to this computer. Stop or reassign them before removing.
